recommendations.title: TÁR
recommendations.overview: As celebrated conductor Lydia Tár starts rehearsals for a career-defining symphony, the consequences of her past choices begin to echo in the present.

recommendations.title: In the Bedroom

recommendations.title: Your Name.

recommendations.title: Revanche

recommendations.title: Radio Days

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Twister

recommendations.title: Mustang
recommendations.overview: In a Turkish village, five orphaned sisters live under strict rule while members of their family prepare their arranged marriages.

recommendations.title: Scenes from a Marriage

recommendations.title: The Woman Next Door
recommendations.overview: Two ex-lovers wind up living next door to each other with their respective spouses. Forbidden passions ensue.
